_comment: Editorial overrides for Wikelo data. Contracts and favor conversions are now extracted from DataForge XML. This file provides: display name mappings, contract metadata (names, tiers, categories, notes), emporiums, gathering items, reputation tiers, and tips.

TheCollector_Intro.name: New to System
TheCollector_Intro.notes: Mandatory introduction mission. Must be completed before any other contracts are available.

TheCollector_OrbVolt_KopSkull.name: Fun Kopion Skull Gun
TheCollector_OrbVolt_KopSkull.notes: Unique weapon skin. Requires significant ore farming.

TheCollector_SlimyLMG.name: Yormandi Gun
TheCollector_SlimyLMG.notes: Unique LMG skin using Yormandi creature drops.

TheCollector_AO_IrrArm.name: Make glowy armor
TheCollector_AO_IrrArm.notes: Exclusive glowing armor set. Requires rare Valakkar creature drops.

TheCollector_Standard.name: Need Ore. Will give Guns.
TheCollector_Standard.notes: Random reward from military-grade ship components.

TheCollector_GG_XanthuleSuit(DO_NOT_USE_.name: Xi'an Xanthule Suit made better
TheCollector_GG_XanthuleSuit(DO_NOT_USE_.notes: Upgraded Xi'an armor variant. Requires the base armor set.

TheCollector_Vehicle_Small_MISC_Prospect.name: Need mining things. Clever things to trade.
TheCollector_Vehicle_Small_MISC_Prospect.notes: Reward ship comes pre-equipped with Grade A industrial components.

TheCollector_Vehicle_Small_Kruger_Wolf_U.name: Want big ship? But not too big?

TheCollector_Vehicle_Medium_ZeusES.name: Very very nice ship for trade

TheCollector_Vehicle_Polaris.name: Now make Polaris. Short Time Deal.
TheCollector_Vehicle_Polaris.notes: End-game contract. Polaris Bits earned by trading 24 SCU Quantanium each. Pre-equipped with military-grade components.

TheCollector_Vehicle_Super_Idris.name: AEGIS Idris P
TheCollector_Vehicle_Super_Idris.notes: The ultimate Wikelo contract. Requires extensive material farming and Polaris Bit accumulation.

reputationTiers.requirement: Complete the introduction mission 'New to System' (1x Vestal Water, 3x Tundra Kopion Horn).
benefits: Earn Wikelo Favors through scrip/material conversion
Weapons, armor skins, and basic vehicle contracts
Reputation increases with each completed contract

reputationTiers.requirement: Accumulate enough reputation through completed contracts.
benefits: Access to mid-tier contracts with better rewards
Unlocks exclusive armor sets and weapon skins

reputationTiers.requirement: Reach maximum reputation through extensive contract completion.
benefits: Access to all contracts including capital ship rewards

emporiums.name: Dasi Station
emporiums.description: The first Wikelo Emporium most players encounter. An asteroid base in Hurston orbit, easily accessible from Lorville.
howToGet: Quantum travel to Dasi Station (appears in orbital markers)
Land at the station and head to the Wikelo Emporium storefront
Deposit contract items via the on-site freight elevator

emporiums.name: Selo Station
emporiums.description: An asteroid base near Yela. A good stop for miners already working the asteroid belt or nearby moons.
howToGet: Quantum travel to Yela from any Crusader location
Look for Selo Station in the orbital markers
Approach and land at the station
The Emporium is near the main trading area

emporiums.name: Kinga Station
emporiums.description: The microTech Emporium. Convenient if you are already operating in the microTech area near New Babbage.
howToGet: Quantum travel to Kinga Station in microTech orbit
Find the Wikelo Emporium storefront inside

gatheringItems.name: Carinite
locations: Sand caves in Stanton (Aberdeen, Daymar, and others)
gatheringItems.tips: Requires the Hathor 'Align & Mine' mission to unlock cave deposits. Mine with multi-tool mining attachment. High demand for Wikelo contracts and crafting.

gatheringItems.name: Carinite (Pure)
gatheringItems.tips: Ultra-rare pure variant. Requires Hathor 'Align & Mine' mission. Very low spawn rate in deep cave systems.

gatheringItems.name: Saldynium (Ore)
gatheringItems.tips: Rare metal valued for laser production. Found in specific geological formations.

gatheringItems.name: Jaclium (Ore)
gatheringItems.tips: A harvestable metal ore. Often co-located with Saldynium deposits.

gatheringItems.name: Tundra Kopion Horn
gatheringItems.tips: Dropped by Tundra Kopions. Needed for the intro mission and many weapon contracts. Approach carefully — they can be aggressive.

gatheringItems.name: Tundra Kopion Tooth
gatheringItems.tips: Rarer drop from Tundra Kopions. Used in Kopion Tooth weapon skins.

gatheringItems.name: Yormandi Eye
gatheringItems.tips: Dropped by Yormandi creatures. Required for armor sets and the Yormandi Gun contract.

gatheringItems.name: Yormandi Tongue
gatheringItems.tips: Rarer Yormandi drop. Fewer needed per contract but harder to obtain.

gatheringItems.name: Valakkar Apex Fang
gatheringItems.tips: Very rare drop from apex Valakkar creatures. Required for glowing armor and ship contracts.

gatheringItems.name: Valakkar Adult Fang
gatheringItems.tips: Dropped by adult Valakkar. More common than apex fangs but still requires cave exploration.

gatheringItems.name: Valakkar Juvenile Fang
gatheringItems.tips: Most common Valakkar drop. Juveniles are easier to find near cave openings.

gatheringItems.name: Irradiated Valakkar Pearl (Grade AA)
gatheringItems.tips: Rare harvestable from Valakkar nests. Grade AA is moderately rare.

gatheringItems.name: Irradiated Valakkar Pearl (Grade AAA)
gatheringItems.tips: Extremely rare. Required for glowing armor contract and favor conversion.

gatheringItems.name: Vestal Water
gatheringItems.tips: Needed for the intro mission. A harvestable liquid found at specific planetary locations.

gatheringItems.name: MG Scrip
gatheringItems.tips: Found in security facility loot. 50 MG Scrip = 1 Wikelo Favor.

gatheringItems.name: Council Scrip
gatheringItems.tips: Found in specific facility loot. 50 Council Scrip = 1 Wikelo Favor.

gatheringItems.name: ASD Secure Drive
gatheringItems.tips: Data drives found at the ASD facility. Required for Snow Camo weapon/armor skins and ATLS contracts.

gatheringItems.name: Ace Interceptor Helmet
gatheringItems.tips: Content item — dropped by enemy pilots. Farm via space combat boarding missions.

gatheringItems.name: Military Badge
gatheringItems.tips: Found in military-themed encounters and facilities.

gatheringItems.name: Military Medal
gatheringItems.tips: Rare drop. Required for high-tier ship contracts.

gatheringItems.name: Tevarin Marker
gatheringItems.tips: Very rare loot item needed for navy-themed armor contracts.

gatheringItems.name: Vanduul Plating
gatheringItems.tips: Salvaged from Vanduul vessels. Required for stealth ship and Vanduul armor contracts.

gatheringItems.name: Vanduul Metal
gatheringItems.tips: Alien metal salvaged from Vanduul wreckage. Pairs with Vanduul Plating in contracts.

gatheringItems.name: Large Artifact Fragment (Pristine)
gatheringItems.tips: Extremely rare artifact. Required for the Wolf stealth ship contract.

gatheringItems.name: DCHS-05 Orbital Positioning Comp-Board
gatheringItems.tips: Rare electronic component needed for Polaris and Idris contracts.

gatheringItems.name: Polaris Bit
gatheringItems.tips: Not found in the wild — only obtainable by trading Quantanium at Wikelo Emporiums. Required for capital ship contracts.

gatheringItems.name: RCMBNT-XTL Modules (A–E)
gatheringItems.tips: Facility-specific loot modules. Five variants (A through E) needed for the Heavy Volt Zapper contract.

favorTips: Wikelo Favors are the primary currency for most premium contracts — earned by converting scrip, ores, or creature drops.
50 MG Scrip, 50 Council Scrip, or 50 Carinite each convert to 1 Wikelo Favor.
12 Irradiated Valakkar Pearls (Grade AAA) also convert to 1 Wikelo Favor — more efficient if you farm creatures.
Polaris Bits are a separate currency earned by trading 24 SCU Quantanium. Needed only for capital ship contracts.
Favors can be spent at any Emporium station, not just where you earned them.
Vehicle contracts start at 2-5 Favors. Mid-tier ships cost 6-10 Favors. Capital ships require 50 Favors + Polaris Bits.
Complete the 'New to System' intro mission first — no other contracts are available until it's done.
Rewards are now deterministic (as of 4.2.1) — you see exactly what you'll get before accepting a contract.
Deposit items via the freight elevator at each Emporium station. Rewards appear in your local inventory after completion.
Check wikelotrades.com for a community tracker that helps manage your inventory and track contract completion.
